name: czrecoil_frame_select_a3d
description: CZRecoilFrame::OnMenuSelectA3D selects the A3D audio backend option.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the czrecoil_frame_audio_api_selectors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja decompilation at 0x431ad0 validates a tail call to zSnd::SetAudioApiOption(zSndBackend_A3D).
The native smoke verifies OnMenuSelectA3D sets audioApi and active backend to 1.
